name: Verify Email (error-resolved)
description: Email verification page in the stable error-resolved state (/verify-email with no token). Without a token the page immediately sets status='error' and renders the 'Verification Failed' view with no API call and no redirect — a deterministic, API-free render analogous to demo-detail's not-found view. The heading and action buttons prove the error state rendered cleanly. Runs in the unauth lane (requiresUnauthenticated). Ports auth-flows.spec.ts verify-email invalid-link state. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Verification failed view
states.description: The no-token error-resolved view: 'Verification Failed' heading plus Go to Home and Request New Link buttons. No API call, no redirect — a stable deterministic render.

assertions.description: 'Verification Failed' heading — proves the no-token error state rendered.
'Go to Home' button in the error state.
'Request New Link' button in the error state.
